title: humboltia tubulosa
intro: Humboltia tubulosa, also known as the Indian snakeroot or Yashad Bhasma, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Humboltia tubulosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Humboltia tubulosa is often prepared in herbal form, such as powders and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
